name: Dr. Dabber Switch Smooth Ceramic Induction Cup
summary: Dr. Dabber Switch Smooth Ceramic Induction Cup — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Dabber Switch Smooth Ceramic Induction cup insert is unlike traditional ceramic nails because it features a pure ceramic dish insert inside a titanium induction cup. Made of thick ceramic, this unique product retains heat for a longer period while distributing it evenly. It is a versatile unit that can vaporise oils and flowers at low temperatures. The product consists of two parts: a ceramic insert and a titanium cup. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
